description: Style Note A brand known for its unpredictable and unique styling baggit continues to awe us with their attractive designs for purses. Available to you in a variety of designs at prices that do not burn a hole in your pocket, these bags are a must buy. So go ahead. Indulge. Product Details Beige bag with top stitching on front and back One main zippered compartment Inner separator and lining with zippered pockets Zippered compartment at the backPatches and rivets near base One short handle with bow detail for carrying ease Materials and Care Synthetic Wipe with damp cloth to remove dirt Size Height: 23 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 15 cm
